# TheTapTempo

TheTapTempo provides free browser-based music tools for musicians, producers, DJs, drummers, educators, and creators. All tools work offline with no registration required.

## Tools

- Tap Tempo: Find the BPM of any song by tapping along.
- Metronome: Practice with adjustable BPM, time signatures, and subdivisions.
- BPM Calculator: Calculate beats per minute from time and measure duration.
- BPM to MS: Convert BPM to millisecond values for note divisions.
- Delay & Reverb Time Calculator: Calculate delay and reverb times from BPM.
- Tempo Markings: Italian tempo terms with BPM ranges.
- Beats Per Bar Calculator: Identify time signatures.

## AI Assistant

- TapTempoAI: AI-powered Q&A about tempo, BPM, rhythm, and music practice.

## More Information

- Blog: Educational guides about rhythm, tempo, and music practice.
- Editorial Policy: Standards for content accuracy and corrections.
- Privacy Policy: Data handling and privacy practices.
